civilTimePolicy.source: IANA time zone identifiers from GeoNames; host runtime supplies transition rules
civilTimePolicy.mainlandChina: Use Asia/Shanghai as the national civil-time default. Preserve GeoNames Asia/Urumqi only as source metadata and require an explicit future convention choice before using local Xinjiang time.
civilTimePolicy.ambiguousWallTime: reject unless the caller explicitly chooses earlier or later occurrence
